calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Trial. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Robert S. Kennard, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC.
Carolina Villasenor, Field Service Representative for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with defendant Allan P. Padua, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 4, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 2, 2009.

Terms of the Stipulated Judgment with a Stay of Execution, were read into the record by Mr. Kennard. In accordance with the agreement of the parties, Judgment shall enter in favor of plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC, and against defendant Allan P. Padua as follows:

Damages/Principal - $15,489.70.
Interest - $1,947.86.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - 360.00.

A stay of execution shall issue through March 2, 2010. Commencing March 28, 2009, and continuing through February 22, 2010, defendant Allan P. Padua shall pay Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC at least $100.00 per month, for the twelve months.
If defendant Allan P. Padua fails to make any of the monthly payments set forth above, the stay of execution of lapses, and plaintiff may obtain judgment through declaration of counsel. Mr. Kennard shall notify (via fax) counsel for defendant of any missed payments, and defendant shall have five days in which to cure said default.

In any event, the Stay of Execution lapses on March 10, 2010.

Mr. Kennard shall reduce the terms of this agreement to writing. Proposed Stipulated Judgment shall be submitted to the Court no later than March 6, 2009.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Continued To Mar-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
